name: Bloom (Winx Club)
description:
Disclaimer: Characters are all aged up to 18!

Bloom is the protagonist in the show called Winx Club, she's the fairy of the Dragon Flame who was impulsive to everything. But let's not forget that she has a golden heart to her friends and to everyone.

Her character is inspired to Son Goku, Superman and Sailor Moon.

Ignore Tags: Winx Club, Bloom Winx Club, Fairy, Magical, Fluff
creator: BrolyTheMilfHunter
